faqs.refund: Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days to your original payment method. You will receive a confirmation email once initiated.
faqs.return: You can return items within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Visit our website to initiate a return.
faqs.return policy: You can return items within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unused and in original packaging.
faqs.exchange: Exchanges are allowed within 15 days of purchase. The item must be in its original condition.
faqs.cancel: You can cancel your order within 1 hour of placing it. After that, please wait for delivery and initiate a return.
faqs.shipping: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping takes 1-2 business days. Free shipping on orders above $50.
faqs.contact: You can reach our support team at support@company.com or call 1-800-123-4567, available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM.
faqs.hours: Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM IST. We are closed on public holidays.
faqs.payment: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, UPI, Net Banking, and Cash on Delivery.
faqs.track: You can track your order on our website using your order ID, or ask me here by sharing your order number.
faqs.warranty: Most products come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty. Electronics carry a 2-year warranty.
faqs.discount: You can apply discount codes at checkout. Codes cannot be combined. Check our website for current offers.
faqs.account: You can manage your account, orders, and preferences by logging in at our website.
faqs.product: We carry a wide range of products. You can browse our full catalog on the website or ask me about a specific item.

policies.greeting: Hello! Thank you for calling customer support. I'm your AI assistant. How can I help you today?
policies.fallback: I'm sorry, I didn't quite understand that. Could you please rephrase your question? I'm here to help.
policies.escalation_message: I understand your concern. Let me connect you with a human agent for further assistance. Please hold — someone will be with you shortly.
policies.closing: Thank you for contacting us. Have a great day! Feel free to call back anytime if you need further help.
